text:
The Innovation 2 Market Patent Showcase will be held on Tuesday, April 2, 2024, for businesses and investors to learn about featured technologies developed by the U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC). ERDC seeks to identify business entities with manufacturing or distribution capabilities that can benefit from commercialization of ERDC patented technologies. There is no cost to attend.
Why You Should Participate
Attendees will have the opportunity to engage directly with ERDC inventors and learn about ERDC’s streamlined licensing process which makes it easier to evaluate and pursue market potential of ERDC innovations. Many of ERDC’s patented technologies have been prototyped, proven, and have dual-use applicability. Participants will be introduced to ERDC patents including:
Bedload Transport Measurement Method, provides real-time monitoring of bedload materials for river management
DNA-Based Testing for Environmental Contamination, rapid, in situ detection and analysis of cyclonite (RDX) and Nitrotriazolone (NTO) contaminants
Electro-Active Enamel-Coated Dowel Bar, durable enamel coating strengthens the bond between concrete and steel
Munitions Compound Detection and Removal System, simple, in situ system identifies and filters harmful munitions contaminants
Portable Gamma Radiation Detector, electronic collimation provides directional radiation sensing without heavy shielding
Sand Boil Filter, lightweight filter kit simplifies sand boil treatment to speed remediation
Attendees will also learn how they can submit innovative solutions for funding consideration by ERDC.
Location
ERDCWERX, 1622 Washington Street (Suite 300), Vicksburg, Mississippi

Download printable agenda

I2M Patent Webinars
The I2M Event Series includes a series of webinars featuring ERDC technologies.
